hero.title: Where great coffee meets clean code.
hero.subtitle: A calm, creative coffee house for makers, students, and dreamers. Single‑origin brews, gigabit Wi‑Fi, and a room engineered for deep focus.

about.title: A coffee house built for the curious.
about.body: KHode started as a midnight conversation between a barista and a developer — a place where Cambodian hospitality meets the quiet focus of a great workspace. We brew every cup with intention, and design every corner for flow.
about.point1Body: Small‑batch beans, pulled to order by baristas who sweat the details.
about.point2Body: Fast Wi‑Fi, power at every seat, and quiet zones for deep work.
about.point3Body: Locally sourced, community‑first, and proudly Cambodian.

menu.title: Crafted cups & kitchen bites
menu.subtitle: From bright single‑origin pour‑overs to comforting Khmer plates — there's a brew for every build.

espresso.name: KHode Espresso
espresso.desc: A velvety double shot with caramel sweetness and a long, clean finish.

latte.name: Cloud Latte
latte.desc: Silky micro‑foam poured over a balanced, chocolatey espresso.

coldbrew.name: 16‑Hour Cold Brew
coldbrew.desc: Steeped low and slow for a smooth, naturally sweet pour.

khmercoffee.name: Khmer Iced Coffee
khmercoffee.desc: Bold robusta and sweet condensed milk over crackling ice.

matcha.name: Matcha Forest
matcha.desc: Stone‑ground ceremonial matcha whisked into creamy oat milk.

coconut.name: Coconut Cooler
coconut.desc: Fresh young coconut with lime and a whisper of mint.

croissant.name: Butter Croissant
croissant.desc: Laminated for days — flaky, golden, and baked at dawn.

amok.name: Fish Amok Bowl
amok.desc: Cambodia's classic coconut curry over steamed jasmine rice.

avotoast.name: Avocado Toast
avotoast.desc: Smashed avocado on sourdough with chili, lime, and sea salt.

features.title: More than a café — a place to make things.
features.subtitle: Small details that turn a coffee run into your most productive hour.

wifi.title: Gigabit Wi‑Fi
wifi.desc: Fiber‑fast, rock‑solid, and free for every guest.

power.title: Power at every seat
power.desc: Outlets and USB‑C always within arm's reach.

roast.title: Roasted in‑house
roast.desc: Beans roasted on‑site and brewed within days.

quiet.title: Focus‑friendly
quiet.desc: Quiet corners and low‑key playlists made for deep work.

pay.title: Scan & pay
pay.desc: Instant ABA KHQR checkout — leave your wallet at home.

open.title: Early till late
open.desc: From sunrise stand‑ups to midnight ship‑its.

gallery.title: Step inside KHode
gallery.subtitle: Warm light, soft wood, and just the right amount of hum.

testimonials.title: What our regulars say
testimonials.subtitle: From remote workers to weekend wanderers — here's why people keep coming back.

sophea.name: Sophea Chan
sophea.quote: My second office. The Wi‑Fi never drops, the cold brew is unreal, and nobody rushes you out. I ship my best work here.

marco.name: Marco Rossi
marco.quote: I've worked from cafés in 30 countries — KHode is top three. Fast internet, real espresso, and the calmest corner in Siem Reap.

dara.name: Dara Kim
dara.quote: Beautiful space, kind staff, and paying with KHQR takes two seconds. It's my go-to for late-night study sessions.

cta.title: Scan. Order. Sip.
cta.subtitle: Skip the queue — order ahead and pay with ABA KHQR in seconds.

order.title: Your order
order.empty: Your cart's empty — add something delicious to get started.

auth.title: Welcome to KHode
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your phone to save orders and earn rewards.
auth.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms & Privacy Policy.
auth.invalidPhone: Hmm, that doesn't look like a valid number.
auth.invalidOtp: That code didn't match. Give it another try.

payment.title: Pay with ABA KHQR
payment.subtitle: Scan the code with any banking app to finish up.
payment.scanHint: Open your banking app · Scan to pay · Tap once paid
payment.successBody: Thank you! We're preparing your order now.

contact.title: Come build with us
contact.subtitle: Find us in the heart of Siem Reap. Walk in, plug in, and stay a while.
contact.addressValue: #0097, Street 63, Wat Svay Village, Sangkat Sala Komrerk, Siem Reap, Cambodia

newsletter.title: Get the good stuff
newsletter.subtitle: New brews, events, and member perks — straight to your inbox. No spam, ever.

footer.blurb: A code‑inspired coffee house in Siem Reap. Brew. Build. Belong.
